style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;strokeColor=#82b366;fillColor=#d5e8d4;rounded=1;fontSize=9;" value="State: Assembling → Endorsing → Dispatching" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;strokeColor=#d6b656;fillColor=#fff2cc;rounded=1;fontSize=10;" value="Confirmation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="840" x="280" y="475" path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
